spaces.name: Sala de Lectura para Adultos
spaces.notes: Main adult reading room — open shelving, study tables, natural light priority

spaces.name: Sala de Lectura Infantil
spaces.notes: Children's reading room — accessible design, age-appropriate furniture, adjacent to lobby

spaces.name: Acervo Cerrado
spaces.notes: Closed stacks / restricted collection area — climate control considerations

spaces.name: Sala de Usos Múltiples
spaces.notes: Multi-purpose room — folding walls, AV provisions, civic art space integration

spaces.name: Administración
spaces.notes: Administrative offices — staff work areas, director office, records storage

spaces.name: Sanitarios
spaces.notes: Public restrooms — full accessibility compliance (IMSS/ISSSTE standards), gender-neutral option required

spaces.name: Vestíbulo
spaces.notes: Main entrance lobby — accessible arrival, information desk, civic art display area

spaces.name: Estacionamiento
spaces.notes: Parking area — accessible parking spaces required per NOM-001-STPS

spaces.name: Bodega
spaces.notes: Storage room — building maintenance and library supplies

assumptions: Total 2,000m² per seed data program; all spaces from seed data program map verified
Circulation, walls, and mechanical spaces not separately listed — included within gross floor area per public civic benchmarks
Solar system is in scope per seed data special_features — included in Phase 2 engineering scope
Civic art space integrated within Sala de Usos Múltiples and Vestíbulo rather than as a separate room — no additional sqm added
Landscape and irrigation included by default per sow-public-civic.md template rules
Construction cost benchmark: MXN 22,000–35,000/sqm for public_civic; midpoint MXN 28,500/sqm used
